def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    atr_multiplier = params['atr_multiplier']
    
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    df['upper_band'] = df['close'] + atr_multiplier * df['atr']
    df['lower_band'] = df['close'] - atr_multiplier * df['atr']
    
    signals = np.where((df['close'] > df['upper_band']) & (df['rsi'] > 70), -1,
                      np.where((df['close'] < df['lower_band']) & (df['rsi'] < 30), 1, 0))
    return pd.Series(signals, index=df.index, dtype='int')
rationale: NZD/USD exhibits mean reversion behavior where price extremes relative to ATR bands combined with RSI overbought/oversold conditions signal potential reversals.
